song.title: Safe in the Arms of Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Safe in the arms of Jesus, Safe on His gentle breast, There by His love o’er-shaded, Sweetly my soul doth rest.|| Hark! ’tis a song of heaven Borne in the sweetest voice, Echoed by saints in spirit, Making my heart rejoice.
[C] Chorus Safe in the arms of Jesus, Safe on His gentle breast, There by His love o’er-shaded, Sweetly my soul doth rest.
[v2] 2) Safe in the arms of Jesus, Safe from corroding care, Safe from the world’s temptations, Sin cannot harm me there.|| Free from the blight of sorrow, Free from my doubts and fears; Only a few more trials, Only a few more tears.
[V3] 3) Jesus, my heart’s dear Refuge, Jesus has died for me; Firm on the Rock of Ages Ever my trust shall be.|| Here let me wait with patience, Wait till the night is o’er, Wait till I see the morning Break on the golden shore.
song.author: Fanny J Crosby
